proposal.hypothesis: The heavy weak plant needs traction-loss detection before backward momentum grows, but lower ordinary and severe hip authority should avoid the pitch and saturation divergence caused by the existing late aggressive recovery.
proposal.expectedEffect: Reduce heavy-weak backward displacement, pitch, tilt, saturation, and fall risk without regressing light-strong, upright locomotion, or motion quality.
